title: CobbleWobble - Cobblemon
description: CobbleWobble is a Cobblemon Modpack. Featuring a variety of carefully selected mods to improve performance
body:
Welcome to CobbleWobble - Australia’s Ultimate Cobblemon Adventure

If you love Minecraft + Pokémon, this is where your journey begins!

CobbleWobble is a multiplayer Cobblemon experience built around progression, exploration, community, and competition.

Whether you want to battle, collect, build, grind, trade, shiny hunt, hang out or become one of the strongest trainers on the server there’s always something to do

🔥 Core Features

✅ 1025 Pokemon available
🏆 Gym battles influencing free-to-play rank progression
💵 Global Trade System
🎯 PokeHunts
💿 TMs
🎁 Daily & Pokedex rewards
🧸 Pokemon Plushies (Including their forms!)
📦 Crates
⚔️ Events
🏪 Server Shops
🤝 Friendly multiplayer community
🛡️ Land claiming & keep inventory
🌟 Frequent updates, balancing & new contents to come

📥 How To Join

1️⃣ Download the CobbleWobble Modpack
2️⃣ Launch the Modpack
3️⃣ Click Multiplayer
4️⃣ Join: play.cobblewobble.au

Hop in our Discord and become part of the CobbleWobble community!
